name.jp: とっておきの護身武器

description.en: Attacks an enemy and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> to the ally with the lowest Health for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다. 실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则护盾量越高。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) Activates <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color> when an ally is inflicted with a <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color>.\nRemoves <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color> from all allies and recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color> 적용 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 해제하고 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)味方単体が<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>状態の場合、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>効果が発動する。\n【迅速対応】:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復する。
description.zh: (触发效果)友军获得<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>时,将触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。\n解除全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> selected ally by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> and increases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>回復し、<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使所选友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Flames

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
Damage taken is reduced by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

받는 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>감소합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>減少する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
受到的伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
